ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., A1-Injection, A2-Broken Authentication and Session Management) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat agent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the threat agent belongs to */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat agent (e.g., EXTERNAL, INTERNAL, ADMIN USERS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat agent was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the threat agent */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the threat agent */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the threat agent is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_agents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_vectors" (
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack vector */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the attack vector belongs to */,
  "vector_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack vector (e.g., EASY, AVERAGE, DIFFICULT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack vector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attack vector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attack vector was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the attack vector */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the attack vector */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the attack vector is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attack_vectors_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the weakness belongs to */,
  "weakness_name" TEXT /* Name of the weakness (e.g., COMMON, WIDESPREAD, RARE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weakness */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weakness was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weakness was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the weakness */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the weakness */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the weakness is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weaknesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detectabilities" (
  "detectability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detectability */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the detectability belongs to */,
  "detectability_name" TEXT /* Name of the detectability (e.g., EASY, AVERAGE, DIFFICULT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detectability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detectability was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detectability was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the detectability */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the detectability */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the detectability is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detectability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detectabilities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the impact belongs to */,
  "technical_impact" TEXT /* Technical impact of the vulnerability (e.g., SEVERE, MODERATE, LOW) */,
  "business_impact" TEXT /* Business impact of the vulnerability (e.g., ALL DATA, AFFECTED DATA AND FUNCTIONS, EXPOSED DATA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the impact */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the impact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the impact is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impacts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the issue belongs to */,
  "issues_found" INTEGER /* Number of issues found for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the issue */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the issue is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "best_fixes" (
  "best_fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each best fix */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the best fix belongs to */,
  "best_fix_name" TEXT /* Name of the best fix */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the best fix */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the best fix was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the best fix was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the best fix */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the best fix */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the best fix is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("best_fix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_best_fixes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "best_fix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best fix the location belongs to */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_best_fix_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_fix_id") REFERENCES best_fixes ("best_fix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
